model_input:
You are a DVOC (Draft-Verify-Action Loop) verifier. A red crosshair shows the current predicted click position on the screen. A fixed blue circle provides spatial reference.

Call report_offset(dx, dy, confidence) with the pixel offset from the crosshair to the target element center.
dx: pixels right (negative = left). dy: pixels down (negative = up).
confidence: 0.0 (uncertain) to 1.0 (certain).

Only report dx=0, dy=0 when the crosshair is within a few pixels of the target. If uncertain, set lower confidence so the loop keeps refining.

Task: Click the Beta project card
Previous iterations:
  iter 0: at (194,92) said dx=232 dy=150 conf=0.90 -> (426,242)
Call report_offset().

raw_message.reasoning_content:
The user wants to click the "Beta project card".
The current crosshair is at (426, 242).
The blue circle is at (426, 242).
I need to find the center of the "Beta" project card.
The "Beta" project card is the middle one in the top row.
It has a green border.
Looking at the image:
The Beta card bounds are approximately:
Left: ~270
Right: ~495
Top: ~185
Bottom: ~375
Center X: (270 + 495) / 2 = 382.5
Center Y: (185 + 375) / 2 = 280

Let's re-estimate.
The cards are in a grid.
Top row cards:
Alpha: [32, 185, 257, 375] (approx)
Beta: [270, 185, 495, 375] (approx)
Gamma: [505, 185, 730, 375] (approx)

Wait, looking at the image:
Alpha card: x ~ 32 to 257, y ~ 185 to 375.
Beta card: x ~ 270 to 495, y ~ 185 to 375.
Gamma card: x ~ 505 to 730, y ~ 185 to 375.

Center of Beta card:
x = (270 + 495) / 2 = 382.5
y = (185 + 375) / 2 = 280

Current crosshair: (426, 242)
dx = center_x - crosshair_x = 382.5 - 426 = -43.5
dy = center_y - crosshair_y = 280 - 242 = 38

Let's refine the Beta card center.
The card title "Beta" is at x ~ 286.
The card icon is at x ~ 305.
The card spans from x=270 to x=495.
The center x is indeed around 382.
The card spans from y=185 to y=375.
The center y is indeed around 280.

Let's look at the crosshair position again. It's at (426, 242).
dx = 382 - 426 = -44
dy = 280 - 242 = 38

Let's re-examine the Beta card's boundaries.
Left edge of Beta card: ~270
Right edge of Beta card: ~496
Top edge: ~185
Bottom edge: ~375
Center X: (270+496)/2 = 383
Center Y: (185+375)/2 = 280

Current crosshair: (426, 242)
dx = 383 - 426 = -43
dy = 280 - 242 = 38

Confidence: It's pretty clear where the card center is. I'll use 0.9.
